stimulus: Due to their dense imagery, fragmented syntax, and obscure references, many of Gertrude Stein’s poems can be quite difficult to ______blank and thus continue to be the subject of debate among literary scholars.
stem: Which choice completes the text with the most logical and precise word or phrase?
rationale: Choice B is correct because "decipher" means to figure out the meaning of something difficult, fitting the description of obscure poems that scholars debate. Choice A is incorrect because composing means creating, not understanding. Choice C is incorrect because translating refers to languages. Choice D is incorrect because publishing isn’t the issue.
